failures.description: The agent misread or only partially considered the catalog search results and produced an incomplete final answer, omitting item 2299424241 ($237.48), which also satisfies the query.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify all available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight priced strictly above $233.90. Up to index 4, the agent had all required information from the ProductCatalogSearch result. That result contained two matching items: item_id 1151293680 priced at 272.33 and item_id 2299424241 priced at 237.48. At index 4, the agent synthesized an answer listing only the first item and omitted the second valid match. This failure is grounded in incorrect use of the tool output rather than misunderstanding the user intent, missing information, or a malformed tool call. The omission was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 incorrectly approved the incomplete answer.
